hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -Eq '^git commit\b.*--no-verify'; then echo '[hook:pre-commit-gate] --no-verify is prohibited on the Chimera project.' >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -Eq '^git (commit|push)\b'; then pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm verify:toolchain-snapshot || { echo '[hook:pre-commit-gate] Gate failed. Fix the above errors and retry.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi
